name: The middle of the Mountain
description:
You are in front of the gate of an old Mansion.
To the south you can see a trail that goes to the Top of the Mountain.
And to the north you see a garden.
There is a sign on the ground.

extra_descriptions.description:
The Dark Mansion was created by Sephiroth
at May 3th 99.
              Enjoy! And die.
